agendaItems.title: File No. CM25-17841Planning Commission staff to give their perspective timeline and an update on their progress on the Future Land Use element of the 2045 Tampa Comprehensive Plan. (Original motion initiated by Hurtak-Miranda on August 28, 2025) Memorandum from Melissa Zornitta, FAICP, Executive Director Planning Commission requesting that said item be heard before lunch. (To be R/F)
